{{ define "main" }}
{{ i18n "changelog" }}

{{ .Title }}

{{ with .Description }}

{{ . }}

{{ end }}
{{ with .Content }}
{{ . }}
{{ end }} {{ $entries := .RegularPagesRecursive }} {{ if $entries }}
{{ range $entries.GroupByDate "January 2006" }}

{{ .Key }}

{{ range .Pages }}
{{ .Date.Format "Jan 02" }}

{{ .Title }} {{ if .Date.After (now.AddDate 0 0 -30) }}{{ i18n "changelog_new" }}{{ end }}

{{ with .Description }}

{{ . }}

{{ end }} {{ with .GetTerms "tags" }}
{{ range . }}#{{ .LinkTitle }}{{ end }}
{{ end }}
{{ end }}
{{ end }}
{{ else }}

{{ i18n "changelog_empty" }}

{{ end }}
{{ end }}
